_doc: This is the census: a hand-written map of regression probes, written BEFORE reading the code and kept INDEPENDENT of the markers it describes. That independence is what makes it useful — deleting a probe's marker leaves the census pointing at something that no longer exists, and the mismatch is what goes red. Do not generate this file from the markers themselves; a derived list can never notice a loss. Schema: each planted entry is id + test (path to the file expected to carry the marker) + bug (why this probe exists, one line) + invariant (the one-sentence guarantee it checks) + ref (optional pointer to further write-up). Entries in `pending` are known gaps: invariants identified but not yet wired to a marker/test. They are not reconciled, just tracked so they don't get forgotten. Your own repo's census lives at `probes.census.json` at the root — this file is a filled-in EXAMPLE the tests in this folder run against, not the file your reconciler reads in production.

planted.bug: Editing an item's quantity in the cart and reopening the summary silently dropped previously applied discounts (issue #482).
planted.invariant: applyDiscounts(cart) -> serialize -> parse returns a cart with the same total and the same set of applied discounts as the input.

planted.bug: The client-side and server-side address validators accepted different sets of PO box formats, so some orders passed the form but were rejected at the payment step.
planted.invariant: validateAddress() run on the client and validateAddress() run on the server agree on every case in the shared fixture corpus.

planted.bug: Signing in mid-checkout replaced the guest cart instead of merging it, dropping items the user had added before authenticating (issue #511).
planted.invariant: mergeCarts(guestCart, accountCart) contains every line item from both inputs, with quantities summed for matching SKUs, and neither input is mutated.

pending.bug: Tax computed per line item can differ from tax computed on the order total by a cent on multi-item orders; not yet isolated into a regression probe.
pending.invariant: sum(perLineTax) equals totalTax(order) for every order in the fixture corpus.
